title: Inspecting, not speculating: a guide to blue chip property.
description: Mark Horvat on why the 'best' investment isn't always the one with the highest yield — and how to evaluate property like an insider.

title: Tax, trusts, and structuring for internationals.
description: Molly Lim on the trust myth, the hidden renovation tax trap, and how ambitious professionals should structure property ownership in Australia.

title: The missing piece in wealth building.
description: Roger Sousa on the underrated role of financial defence alongside accumulation — protecting assets and planning for a secure retirement.

title: From coding to co-founding: the PiFi Property story.
description: Heshan Jayawardena on building a platform that uncovers hidden potential in properties — and where AI is taking property search next.

title: Navigating property investment.
description: Tim Watson on his move from corporate life to founding a buyer's agency, and what strategic property investment really looks like.

title: From accountant to app founder: Alesha Masaud's story behind TaxApp.
description: Alesha on her journey from Pakistan to Sydney, the challenges of building a digital-first accounting platform, and property investment insights.

title: From the UK to Australia: how financial planner Scott Palmer made the move.
description: Scott Palmer on the nuances of financial planning across borders, early investment habits, and navigating pensions and wealth management.

title: Unlocking property potential: insights from Rohit Gehlot.
description: Rohit on going from corporate employee to buyer's agent, building a property portfolio, and what's happening in the Melbourne market.

title: From dreams to reality: Wilson Tran's legal path.
description: Wilson Tran on the legal side of property — what buyers need to know before contracts are signed, and common mistakes to avoid.

title: Navigating Australian real estate: Janet Chiang's story.
description: Janet Chiang on the realities of buying and selling in the Australian market — and what first-time buyers often get wrong.

title: From corporate to accounting entrepreneur: Sarah Pyke's story.
description: Sarah Pyke on leaving the corporate world, building an accounting practice, and the financial foundations that matter when buying property.
